mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user WHERE email = #{email} AND password = #{password}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user ( email, password, name, gender, birthday , phone_number, registered_at, role ) VALUES(#{email}, #{password}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{birthday}, #{phone_number}, NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT tag_id FROM tag WHERE tag_name = #{tagName}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE email = #{email}
